prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: A Casserole for the Missing
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Hallmark Possession Event
Tagline: Love lives here. So does arson.
Theme: Some homes hold families. Some hold motive.
Omen: phone static saying her name
Relationship dynamic: suspiciously healthy handyman friendship
Props: snow globe, blood-adjacent tea towel, casserole dish

Cast:
- Claire Sutton | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=magazine editor | threat_aura=0.21 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=buried one traumatic detail under work for years; has an unsent email that would destroy a family
- Mara Pruitt | archetype=decorative_husband | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=regional dentist | threat_aura=0.44 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=moved money during a family emergency
- Cole Bennett | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=real estate agent | threat_aura=0.38 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=knows about a half sibling no one asked for
- Wyatt Pruitt | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=widow with a foundation | threat_aura=0.84 | space=toolshed described as retreat supplies | secrets=had brunch with someone officially deceased
- Tess Bell | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=high school coach | threat_aura=0.42 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=ignored a warning text on the worst possible night
- Claire Lark | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=substitute teacher | threat_aura=0.49 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=keeps screenshots like religious texts
- Sienna Bell | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Brooke Marlowe | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Mara Pruitt is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Claire Sutton says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Winter Hollow.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Mara?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Sienna. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Claire. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The snow globe is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Wyatt."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
